acceptance_criteria.text: Define a local authenticated channel contract for ForgeWire and other agentic apps to send human-directed messages with source identity, intent, urgency, expiry, and actions.
Persist agent-originated messages in a way that separates them from SMS conversations while preserving auditability, retention, and backup/export behavior.
Add UI affordances for agent channels that do not create a social feed or compete for infinite feed time.
Document security boundaries: caller authentication, loopback exposure, rate limits, redaction/logging rules, action approval, and failure states.
Provide integration evidence from at least one ForgeWire or local agentic app prototype using the channel.
